feat(tea): Cmd.Quit carries exit code, Cmd.toMessages, Program.simulate, OSC52 clipboard, terminal crash safety

- All 1122 tests passing

commit.message:
fix: prevent ghost-slide blank pages from touying-set-config anchor regression (#289)

* Initial plan

* wip: start working on dewdrop new-section-slide-fn issue

Co-authored-by: OrangeX4 <34951714+OrangeX4@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: add layout anchor to prevent wrong heading page assignments with context-only slide bodies

When a slide body contains only context elements (lazily evaluated), Typst's
first layout pass may fail to properly anchor the page, causing hidden headings
from subsequent slides to receive incorrect page numbers. This makes
display-current-heading queries return wrong headings.

Add v(0pt, weak: true) at the end of setting-fn in touying-slide so every
slide always ends with at least one real layout element. This properly anchors
the page in Typst's first pass with zero visual impact.

Fixes: https://github.com/touying-typ/touying/issues/388

Co-authored-by: OrangeX4 <34951714+OrangeX4@users.noreply.github.com>

* update tests

* fix: prevent ghost slides for touying-set-config when no visible preamble; add v(0pt,weak:true) anchor for dewdrop issue

commit.message:
Bug fixes, unit tests, and SwiftArgumentParser migration (#31)

* empty commit

* Add CLAUDE.md and improvement plan documentation

* Add unit tests for AckGenCore

- Replace broken integration test with 6 comprehensive unit tests
- Test initialization, Comparable, encoding/decoding, and array operations
- All tests passing

This fixes the issue where 'swift test' was running 0 tests

* Migrate CLI to SwiftArgumentParser and fix critical bugs

Breaking changes:
- Migrate from positional arguments to named flags
  Old: ackgen path/to/file.plist 1 "Title"
  New: ackgen --output path/to/file.plist --settings --title "Title"
- Add --help and --version commands (auto-generated)

Bug fixes:
- Fix force unwrap crash when LICENSE files contain invalid UTF-8
- Add proper exit codes (Darwin.exit) so Xcode build phases fail on errors
- Replace error returns with ValidationError throws for better error messages

Dependencies:
- Add swift-argument-parser 1.3.0

Updated Example scripts to use new CLI syntax.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

* Add validation for empty acknowledgements

Throws ValidationError when no license files are found, preventing
silent generation of empty plist files. Includes helpful message

commit.message:
Scribe: Document CSP race condition diagnostic and fix

Lisa Simpson diagnosed and fixed a critical race condition in webview asset loading:
- User reported F5 testing shows default colored rectangles instead of custom sprites
- Root cause: loadAssets() used fetch() which is blocked by VS Code CSP (no connect-src)
- The catch block reset assetsReady=false, overriding the true already set by URI-based loaders
- Solution: Removed eager loadAssets() call and guarded catch block

Files modified in webview:
- webview-ui/src/office/components/OfficeCanvas.tsx (removed loadAssets call)
- webview-ui/src/office/sprites/assetLoader.ts (guarded catch block)

New Decision § 16: Never use fetch() in webview — CSP blocks it.
All asset loading must use extension-provided URIs via postMessage.

commit.message:
Add scenario dashboard and multi-scenario management for signed-in users (#90)

Signed-in users previously had a single autosaved calculator state with
no way to manage multiple scenarios or navigate between them. This adds
a full scenario management layer: named scenarios, a dashboard to
list/open/rename/delete them, and autosave that captures key inputs and
headline results for dashboard display.

## Storage layer

- `StorageManager` gains `renameScenario()`, `createNewScenario()`,
`activateScenario()`, and `_extractKeyInputs()`
- Caches `activeScenarioId` / `activeScenarioName` to eliminate
redundant profile fetches on every autosave
- `_extractKeyInputs()` extracts `parent1Income`, `parent2Income`,
`childrenCount`, `workDaysCount`, `weeklyOutOfPocket` from the save
state — stored server-side so the dashboard summary requires no extra
fetches
- `saveScenario()` now uses the cached scenario ID and includes
`keyInputs` in the payload; falls back to profile lookup only when the
ID is unknown

```js
// autosave now includes results so out-of-pocket is persisted with the scenario
const state = { formData, results: lastResults, timestamp };
storageManager.autoSave(state);
```

## API (`api/src/services/scenarios.js`)

- `createScenario` / `updateScenario` persist a `keyInputs` JSON column
- `_toScenarioSummary` returns `keyInputs` in list responses — dashboard
reads everything it needs from a single `GET /api/scenarios`

## Dashboard (`src/dashboard.html` + `src/js/ui/dashboard-manager.js`)

- Scenario cards show name, last-updated relative time, key inputs, and
weekly out-of-pocket headline
- Rename modal doubles as the "New Scenario" dialog
(`_isNewScenarioMode` flag) to avoid duplicating modal markup
- All errors are inline (no `alert()`); delete failure shown inside the
confirmation modal

## Calculator integration (`src/index.html` + `src/app.js` +
`src/js/ui/form-handler.js`)

- Auth panel gains: current scenario name, inline rename form, inline
new-scenario form (no `prompt()`), "My Scenarios" link
- `form-handler.js` detects `?scenarioId=` on load, activates the
requested scenario, cleans the URL, and dispatches `scenarioChanged` —
enabling deep-linking from the dashboard
- `app.js` listens for `scenarioChanged` to keep the panel name display
in sync

## Tests

- 15 new unit tests for `renameScenario`, `createNewScenario`,
`activateScenario`, `_extractKeyInputs`
- `beforeEach` in storage and integration tests now resets
`activeScenarioId` / `activeScenarioName` to prevent state leakage from
the new caching
- Integration conflict test updated: with `activeScenarioId` now cached
from `syncWithCloud`, the subsequent `saveScenario` skips the profile
lookup and goes straight to `PUT`; test mock queue adjusted accordingly

commit.message:
fix: remove eager loadAssets() call that reset assetsReady flag

OfficeCanvas.tsx called loadAssets() on mount, which used fetch()
to load tileset.json via relative URLs. This always failed because
the webview CSP has default-src 'none' with no connect-src directive.
The catch block then set assetsReady = false, overriding the true
value set by URI-based loaders (tilesetMetadataLoaded,
characterAssetsLoaded messages from the extension host).

Fix: Remove the eager loadAssets() call from OfficeCanvas since the
extension host sends webview-safe URIs for all PNG assets. Also guard
the catch block in loadAssets() so it only resets assetsReady if no
URI-based loader has already succeeded.

commit.message:
fix: address TUI audit findings F-01 through F-17

F-01: Transitions now preserve span-level styles (syntax highlighting,
heading colours) throughout all animation types. Rewrote transitions.rs
to operate on (char, Style) pairs instead of flattening to plain text.
Added spans_to_chars / chars_to_line / normalised_chars helpers.

F-02: Undo/redo chips now show correct keys [u undo] and [r redo]
instead of the wrong [Z undo] / [Y redo].

F-03: Rapid nav no longer visually jumps — start_transition_if_needed
completes any in-progress transition instantly before starting a new one.

F-04: Fade is now a 3-phase crossfade (dim source → blank → dest) rather
than a hard binary cut at progress=0.5.

F-05: Code block lines are truncated to terminal width to prevent layout
overflow from long lines.

F-06: Width-sensitive functions now use unicode-width display width
(.width()) instead of chars().count() in blocks_text.rs, progress.rs,
presenter.rs, breadcrumb.rs.

F-07: Fade transition now uses eased_progress for phase thresholds,
consistent with all other transition types.

F-08: Default syntax theme changed from base16-ocean.dark to
base16-mocha.dark for warmer tones that complement Rosé Pine.

F-09: Branch overlay now scrolls when options overflow the viewport.
Added branch_scroll_offset field to App and PresenterViewState.
branch_scroll_to_focused() keeps the focused option visible. ▲/▼
scroll indicators shown when content is clipped.

F-10: Graph overlay uses adaptive sizing (88/80/70% width based on
terminal width, 90/80% height based on terminal height) instead of
hardcoded 74%/76%.

F-11: Footer hints now build progressively — nav arrows always shown,
features added one by one as width permits (60/80/100/120 breakpoints).

F-12: Help overlay layout switch has hysteresis: centred up to 84 cols,
side panel above 84 (was a hard cut at 80).

F-13: Progress bar MAX_SEGMENTS cap removed — segment count now scales
fully to available width.

F-14: Breadcrumb labels use adaptive per-segment width based on
area.width / path_count, clamped to 6–24 chars.

F-15: Timeline max items estimate improved from width/8 to width/5.

F-17: Timer now uses H:MM:SS format when elapsed >= 3600 seconds
(presentations longer than 60 minutes no longer overflow).

89 tests pass · clippy clean · rustfmt clean

test: add 28 E2E integration tests for full pipeline depth (#145)

* test: add 28 E2E integration tests for full pipeline depth

Add comprehensive end-to-end integration tests that prove the full
device → axis engine → bus → sim adapter pipeline works correctly.

Test categories (28 tests total):
- Device to bus pipeline (6): parse/normalize/publish, multi-device,
  disconnect/reconnect, 1kHz→250Hz downsampling, 50Hz interpolation
- Axis engine pipeline (6): raw→deadzone→curve→expo→output, profile
  switch mid-stream, multi-axis channels, clamping, 250Hz timing,
  latency measurement
- Bus to sim adapter (6): snapshot→sim write, adapter disconnect,
  multiple subscribers (UI+sim+diag), event ordering, backpressure
- Full roundtrip (6): device→axis→bus→sim, profile cascade, safe
  mode recovery, multi-device/multi-sim, watchdog, metrics collection
- Trace replay (4): record from pipeline, replay verification,
  serialization roundtrip, golden-file comparison

All tests use fake backends (FakeDevice, FakeSim) and deterministic
clocks from flight-test-helpers. No hardware dependency.

commit.message:
fix(run_fuzzer): increase timeout-ms from 2000 to 4000 to reduce false-positive objectives

Under 8-worker CPU contention, system_reset + SeaBIOS reinit (~200-400ms)
combined with subsequent ops can exceed 2000ms, triggering LibAFL timeout
objectives that replay successfully (false positives classified as unknown).
Increasing to 4000ms provides sufficient margin while still catching real hangs.
